Video.summary: The guys bring the well-known but anemic 305 SBC into the shop by viewer request.
Video.title: Tearing Down and Prep of Our 305 SBC Build

Image.alt: Tearing Down and Prep of Our 305 SBC Build
Tearing Down and Prep of Our 305 SBC Build
Tearing Down and Prep of Our 305 SBC Build

Video.summary: Pat and Frankie finish building up their jazzed up 305 SBC.
Video.title: Building Up Our Hot Rod 305 SBC

Image.alt: Building Up Our Hot Rod 305 SBC
Building Up Our Hot Rod 305 SBC
Building Up Our Hot Rod 305 SBC

Video.summary: We bring our 305 Small Block Chevy back for a second round of racier upgrades.
Video.title: Return of the 305 SBC: The Upgrades Continue

Image.alt: Return of the 305 SBC: The Upgrades Continue
Return of the 305 SBC: The Upgrades Continue
Return of the 305 SBC: The Upgrades Continue

Video.summary: We take a stock 305 Chevy and a 302 Ford and find out dollar for horsepower who comes out on top.
Video.title: Ford vs Chevy: Small Displacement Showdown

Image.alt: Ford vs Chevy: Small Displacement Showdown
Ford vs Chevy: Small Displacement Showdown
Ford vs Chevy: Small Displacement Showdown

Video.summary: 302 vs 305! Round 2 of the classic debate. Budget head swap dyno test. Which 90's head rules?
Video.title: 302 vs. 305 Round 2

Video.summary: 302 SBF vs. 305 SBC battle: We're increasing compression on both, comparing gains head-to-head!
Video.title: 302 vs 305 Pt 3 High Compression Showdown

Video.summary: We do something never done before: build two engines to run on the dyno at the SAME TIME!
Video.title: Two Engines, One Big Plan

Video.summary: We connect TWO 496 Big Block Chevy engines to the dyno to find out exactly how much power they make.
Video.title: Two 496 Big Blocks on One Dyno

Image.alt: Two 496 Big Blocks on One Dyno
Two 496 Big Blocks on One Dyno
Two 496 Big Blocks on One Dyno

Video.summary: We seek more power from our twin-engine setup by reconfiguring the exhaust and phasing the engines.
Video.title: More Double Dyno Tech

Video.summary: We're building a 427ci pump-gas LSx for a Music City Trucks C10, aiming for serious hot rod power.
Video.title: 427ci LSx Part 1

Video.summary: We're finishing our 427ci LSx engine for Music City Trucks' C10, adding EFI and dyno-tuning it.
Video.title: 427ci LSx Part 2

Video.summary: We're twin-turboing our 600+ HP 427ci Small Block Chevy with new EFI, pushing "Baby Blue" to the limit!
Video.title: Twins for the Win

Video.summary: We're fitting our 509 cubic inch Big Block into its new 1956 Chevrolet 210 home.
Video.title: ’56 Chevy Goes Gasser

Video.summary: This Small Block Ford receives big power upgrades.
Video.title: 410ci Stroker Windsor

Video.summary: We’re expecting great numbers in the dyno cell for the 410ci Small Block Ford.
Video.title: Stroker Windsor Dyno Test

Video.summary: Engine Power embarks on a new project for SCCA’s inaugural SPEC Mustang class.
Video.title: SCCA SPEC Mustang Part 1

Video.summary: Our SPEC Mustang Project is back for final touches, as we get it ready to hit the track.
Video.title: SCCA SPEC Mustang Part 2

Video.summary: Out of the shop and into the yard! We take a weekend to rebuild a 350ci small block Chevy V8.
Video.title: Backyard Engine Build

Video.summary: We take the 350ci Small Block Chevy built in the parking lot and upgrade short block assembly.
Video.title: Backyard Build Upgrades

Video.summary: We finish our 350 Small Block Chevy with high-performance induction, then put it to the test.
Video.title: Dyno Testing the Upgraded Backyard Build

Image.alt: Dyno Testing the Upgraded Backyard Build
Dyno Testing the Upgraded Backyard Build
Dyno Testing the Upgraded Backyard Build

Video.summary: Does a ’15 F150 Ford EcoBoost stand a chance against a ’05 Dodge Ram SRT-10?
Video.title: Ford F150 EcoBoost vs Dodge Ram SRT-10: Muscle Trux Build-Off Begins

Image.alt: Ford F150 EcoBoost vs Dodge Ram SRT-10: Muscle Trux Build-Off Begins
Ford F150 EcoBoost vs Dodge Ram SRT-10: Muscle Trux Build-Off Begins
Ford F150 EcoBoost vs Dodge Ram SRT-10: Muscle Trux Build-Off Begins

Video.summary: Dropping it down for better traction, our SRT-10 Ram and EcoBoost F150 get new lowering kits.
Video.title: Ram SRT-10 and F150 Get Lowering Kits: Muscle Trux Build-Off Suspension

Image.alt: Ram SRT-10 and F150 Get Lowering Kits: Muscle Trux Build-Off Suspension
Ram SRT-10 and F150 Get Lowering Kits: Muscle Trux Build-Off Suspension
Ram SRT-10 and F150 Get Lowering Kits: Muscle Trux Build-Off Suspension

Video.summary: OBS 632 SS Chevy gets suspension mocked up: spring pocket mods, frame work, c-notch, then powder coat.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 2 Chassis Chaos

Video.summary: OBS 632 SS frame mods: boxing plates, fuel tank mockup, clutch install, drivetrain drop.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 3 Building Blocks

Video.summary: The OBS 632 is getting fuel and brake lines, custom exhaust, a stripped cab, and bed mods.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 4 Taking Shape

Video.summary: We build a Ford 9-inch for the OBS Chevy and show an inexpensive interior panel color change.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 5 Color Cover Up

Image.alt: OBS 632 SS Part 5 Color Cover Up
OBS 632 SS Part 5 Color Cover Up
OBS 632 SS Part 5 Color Cover Up

Video.summary: The OBS Chevy chassis is back from powder coat. We start assembly to get the sport truck running again.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 6 Some Assembly Required

Image.alt: OBS 632 SS Part 6 Some Assembly Required
OBS 632 SS Part 6 Some Assembly Required
OBS 632 SS Part 6 Some Assembly Required

Video.summary: Our 632 SS project nears completion with battery relocation, interior refurbishment, and traction control.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 7 Refresh and Reuse

Image.alt: OBS 632 SS Part 7 Refresh and Reuse
OBS 632 SS Part 7 Refresh and Reuse
OBS 632 SS Part 7 Refresh and Reuse

Video.summary: Our 632 Chevy is almost done! We're finishing the interior, adding exterior details, then hitting the road.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 8 Sport Truck Assemble/Crossing the Finish Line

Image.alt: OBS 632 SS Part 8 Sport Truck Assemble/Crossing the Finish Line
OBS 632 SS Part 8 Sport Truck Assemble/Crossing the Finish Line
OBS 632 SS Part 8 Sport Truck Assemble/Crossing the Finish Line

Video.summary: We make improvements to a new Ford F350 Crew Cab Dually that will make the truck more functional.
Video.title: F350 Dually Work Truck Upgrades

Video.summary: Will the EcoBoost's larger turbos and a high flow exhaust mean bigger improvements?
Video.title: Ram SRT-10 and F150 Get Engine Mods: Muscle Trux Build-Off: Drivetrain

Image.alt: Ram SRT-10 and F150 Get Engine Mods: Muscle Trux Build-Off: Drivetrain
Ram SRT-10 and F150 Get Engine Mods: Muscle Trux Build-Off: Drivetrain
Ram SRT-10 and F150 Get Engine Mods: Muscle Trux Build-Off: Drivetrain

Video.summary: With power taken care off, improvements in the good-looks department include cowl hood and custom wheels.
Video.title: Ram SRT-10 and F150 Exterior Extras: Muscle Trux Build-Off: Button Up

Image.alt: Ram SRT-10 and F150 Exterior Extras: Muscle Trux Build-Off: Button Up
Ram SRT-10 and F150 Exterior Extras: Muscle Trux Build-Off: Button Up
Ram SRT-10 and F150 Exterior Extras: Muscle Trux Build-Off: Button Up

Video.summary: Budgets spent and trucks built, the Ford and Ram go head to head to compare numbers.
Video.title: Ram SRT-10 vs. F150 EcoBoost: Muscle Trux Build-Off Shootout

Image.alt: Ram SRT-10 vs. F150 EcoBoost: Muscle Trux Build-Off Shootout
Ram SRT-10 vs. F150 EcoBoost: Muscle Trux Build-Off Shootout
Ram SRT-10 vs. F150 EcoBoost: Muscle Trux Build-Off Shootout

Video.summary: Our guys are towing the line because it’s all about second chances for a 1977 Chevy C-30 tow truck!
Video.title: Tow Truck

Video.summary: What do you get when you combine a Bug and a UTV? The answer: BajAwesome.
Video.title: Bajawesome Bug

Video.summary: Turning A 1941 Dodge Army Truck into Sergeant Rock
Video.title: Sergeant Rock

Video.summary: Sergeant Rock Gets Metal Work Done
Video.title: Metal Working

Video.summary: Bed Construction For Sergeant Rock
Video.title: Sergeant Rock Bed Construction

Video.summary: We give you an update on transforming the 1941 Dodge Power Wagon into the legendary Sergeant Rock.
Video.title: Sergeant Rock

Video.summary: We transform a neglected 1941 Dodge army truck, Sergeant Rock, with a custom paint job.
Video.title: Sergeant Rock Part 2

Video.summary: We explore the process of creating a custom suspension for a military-style truck using salvaged parts.
Video.title: Sergeant Rock Part 3

Video.summary: We explore engine choices for the Sergeant Rock project, opting for a beefy 850 horsepower Mopar engine.
Video.title: Engine Choices For Sgt. Rock

Video.summary: The Sergeant Rock Army Truck comes to life with a mix of vintage and modern elements.
Video.title: Sergeant Rock Pay-Off

Video.summary: We dust off our Test Sled from the pits of darkness and give it a new life.
Video.title: Test Sled Reincarnated Stage 1

Video.summary: Our Test Sled has been rejuvenated with a new engine & transmission.
Video.title: Test Sled Reincarnated Stage 2

Video.summary: Our Small Block Chevy cracked during a cold snap. So we’re going to put the guts in a bigger block.
Video.title: Compression Obsession: A Bigger Block

Video.summary: Once we finish assembly on our improved Compression Obsession SBC, we’ll run this mule on the dyno.
Video.title: Compression Obsession: More Power

Video.summary: We build a big-inch, pump-gas Chevy W-Series monster from an aluminum block!
Video.title: 509ci W-Series Big Block Chevy Part 1

Video.summary: We continue building our 509ci W-Series with high-flow induction and EFI for big dyno power.
Video.title: 509ci W-Series Big Block Chevy Part 2

Video.summary: From freeway to farmyard, this rugged straight six was everywhere! It’s the subject of our latest build.
Video.title: Ford 300 Inline Six

Video.summary: Even after 45 years, our antique Ford engine still runs.
Video.title: A Fine Inline Six

Video.summary: The six-cylinder Ford’s numbers keep climbing as we give it major cam, piston, and cylinder head upgrades.
Video.title: Ford’s Big Buzzin’ Half Dozen

Video.summary: Our famous Ford 300 comes home to the Engine Power shop for even BIGGER POWER upgrades.
Video.title: Ultimate Ford 300 Turbo Build - Part 1

Video.summary: Johnson's Hot Rod Shop's '32 Ford Roadster: a wild, hot pink, 500hp drivable masterpiece!
Video.title: Johnson Hot Rod - 32 Roadster

Video.summary: Dig's Rod Shop unveils a '47 Chevy pickup: a "Zey Bronze" stunner with 640hp and unique barn wood details.
Video.title: Digs Rod Shop - 1947 Chevy 3100
